exp.pattern:
(?x)
    -?                                  # Optional negative sign
    (?:
        0                               # Can be a lone zero
        |
        [1-9][0-9]* # Or a non-zero digit followed by any number of digits
    )
    (?: \. [0-9]+ )?                    # Optional fraction: dot MUST be followed by 1+ digits
    (?: [eE] [+-]? [0-9]+ )?            # Optional exponent component
    \b
